name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

labels: enhancement

## What problem does this solve?
<!-- What is currently missing or frustrating? -->

## Describe the feature
<!-- A clear description of what you want to build -->

## Where in the codebase would this live?
<!-- e.g. frontend component, Flask route, RAG pipeline, loader -->

## Proposed approach
<!-- How would you implement this? Even a rough idea helps -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Any other approaches you thought about? -->

## Would you like to work on this?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] No, just suggesting it

## Additional context
<!-- Screenshots, links, or references -->
